_comment: WC2026 Group L, MD3. Standings before: England 4, Ghana 4 (1-0 Panama, 0-0 England), Croatia 3 (2-4 England, 1-0 Panama), Panama 0. This match DECIDES 2nd: Ghana (4 pts) qualify 2nd with a draw; Croatia (3 pts) MUST WIN to overtake them (a draw leaves Croatia 3rd on 4 pts, still in best-third contention). So Croatia has a legitimate STRUCTURAL incentive to attack (must win), while Ghana -- a proven stingy block that held England 0-0 and has conceded 0 all group -- will be content to sit deep and protect the point. That is exactly the organized-underdog archetype (England-Ghana 0-0, the same Ghana): Croatia the quality favourite, but Ghana's discipline keeps the draw/Under a live tail. Croatia (Modric-led) the better side and goal-hungry by necessity. Home = Croatia, away = Ghana. Cards not modelled (referee TBD).

meta.stakes: Decides 2nd place: Ghana (4 pts) go through with a draw; Croatia (3 pts) must win to take 2nd (a draw leaves them 3rd, best-third contention). Croatia the quality side and must-win attacker; Ghana a stingy block playing for the point.

home.name: Croatia
notes: Quality, Modric-led; scored 2 vs England. MUST WIN -> attacks (legitimate structural incentive, not a motivation guess). attack 1.22, context 1.05.
Decent but not airtight at the back (conceded 4 to England). defense 0.95.

away.name: Ghana
notes: Stingy, organized: 0-0 England, conceded 0 all group. attack 0.85 (low, plays for the point).
Hard to break down -> keeps the draw/Under live. defense 0.92.
A draw qualifies them 2nd -> will sit deep and protect it.
